title: APEX CONTEXT_BUDGET.json (v7)
description: Per-zone token budgets, utilization thresholds, rotation triggers, and per-agent input limits. v7 design target: 50-60% utilization. [שיפור 19]

capacity_tokens.description: Effective context window capacity in tokens. Default 200000.

auto_continuity.description: v7.1 Auto-Continuity Layer thresholds (memory-watchdog, turn-checkpoint, decision-gate-default). Optional — absent on projects predating Auto-Continuity Layer; consumers MUST fall back to documented defaults.

bun_memory_threshold_mb.description: Hard threshold (MB) for Bun PrivateMemorySize / Commit. Above this, memory-watchdog increments consecutive_over_threshold. Default 2048.

bun_memory_warn_pct.description: Soft threshold as percent of bun_memory_threshold_mb. Below the hard threshold but above this triggers a status banner. Default 70.

bun_memory_debounce_samples.description: Number of consecutive samples over threshold required before AUTO_PAUSE_REQUEST.flag is created. Prevents one-off spikes from triggering pause. Default 3.

memory_sample_interval_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between memory samples (memory-watchdog rides on PostToolUse but throttles itself). Default 30.

turn_checkpoint_interval.description: Frequency (in tool calls) at which turn-checkpoint.sh writes .apex/TURN_CHECKPOINT.json inside a long-running task. Default 5.

turn_checkpoint_freshness_minutes.description: Maximum age of TURN_CHECKPOINT.json in minutes for /apex:resume to surface a 'continue from checkpoint' prompt. Default 30.

session_auto_resume.description: When true (default), session-auto-resume.sh emits a SESSION_BOOT banner that instructs Claude to invoke /apex:resume on any new session where session.auto_paused == true.

decision_gate_default_action_minutes.description: Minutes the decision-gate waits for user input before applying decision_gate_default_action. Default 10.

decision_gate_default_action.description: Default action for decision-gate timeout. Default 'pause' — safe, never silently continues a degraded session.

max_consecutive_auto_pauses.description: Breaker: after N consecutive auto-pause→auto-resume cycles within auto_pause_cooldown_minutes, halt and require manual intervention. Default 3.

masking_window_turns.description: R13-002 (F-302): Number of most-recent turns retained verbatim in the zone; tool-result blocks older than this window are replaced with single-line masking stubs by framework/hooks/observation-mask.sh. Default 3. Applies primarily to working_memory; other zones may set it for future expansion.
